text:
is the first official guidebook for the Attack on Titan manga, written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama.

An English version called Attack on Titan Guidebook, which combined Attack on Titan: INSIDE Kou and Attack on Titan: OUTSIDE Kou, was released in North America on September 16, 2014 by Kodansha Comics.

Table of contents

Colossus Titan Papercraft
Color Illustration Gallery
Prologue
Character Encyclopedia
Character Encyclopedia Part 1: 104th Training Corps
Character Encyclopedia Part 2: The Garrison
Character Encyclopedia Part 3: Survey Corps
Character Encyclopedia Part 4: Military Police Brigade
Character Encyclopedia Part 5: Keys to Unlocking the World
Songs of Resistance
An Illustrated Guide to Humanity's Weapons
The Many Tools of the World of Attack on Titan
Titan Files
Guide to the Story and Tactics of Attack on Titan
A History of Humanity's Resistance
Situation Report on the State of Humanity
First Character Popularity Poll
Analyzing Humanity & the Titans
